content:
I've checked your Google Tasks and found a dedicated list called **"Stacker to do"** with 22 items. Here are the tasks you have pending for the app:

### 🛠️ Functionality & Sync
*   **Fix saving and back end** (Logging, account deletion) — *Note: We just worked on profile sync.*
*   **Make sure everything is right for the back end** (Add Google account)
*   **Link goals with tasks** so you can calculate time spent on them.
*   **The calendar move date** (Bug/Feature)
*   **Fix filter**

### 🎨 Design & UI Refinements
*   **Redesign Colors** — *Note: We just improved auto-color conflict resolution!*
*   **Removing Colors by accident** (UI is "ugly")
*   **Reordering tag badges** to be consistent with the carousel.
*   **The slide to completion hides the end shadow** of the task.
*   **Goals and anti-goal redesign.**
*   **Mini inconsistencies in UI** (e.g., "press what pressed").
*   **Sprint mode deletes my shadows** (It's not cool!).

### ⏱️ Timer & Sprints
<truncated 510 bytes>
